compiled_state.title: Fix: Gate 2a fallback signal uses invalid JSON notation (unquoted keys)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md Gate 2a fallback signal block uses unquoted keys ({gate_id: ...}) which fails JSON parsing by validate-gate-signal.py. Gate 2b equivalent correctly uses valid JSON. Fix to use quoted keys matching the contract.

comments.body: Investigation: Gate 2a fallback JSON in fix-bug/SKILL.md (line 644) already uses properly quoted keys. The gate-2a-reversal-check.sh script also uses proper Python JSON serialization. All 7 gate 2a tests pass. Bug was resolved in commit 2bfd65f9 (feat: integrate gates 1a, 2a, 2b into fix-bug SKILL.md).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
